message:
test(serve): batch 19 — bead CRUD, policy, git sync, openapi TLS, safety check, redact branches

Exercises deeper success paths for bead get/update/close with real projectDir,
policy get with rules=true, policy update with valid YAML, git sync dry-run
modes, OpenAPI spec with TLS (https URL branch), safety check for allowed and
approval commands, redactingResponseWriter.Write without WriteHeader (statusCode=200),
and logRedactionSummary JSON marshal path.

Key per-function improvements:
- handleUpdateBead: 87.1%
- handleSafetyCheckV1: 83.3%
- handleOpenAPISpec: 87.5%
- redactingResponseWriter.Write: 100%
- handlePolicyUpdateV1: 75.8%
- handleGitSyncV1: 75.7%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
